title: Appmixer Flow
description: A Flow represents an automation workflow in Appmixer, consisting of connected components that define integration logic between services.

flow.description: Flow definition object containing the workflow graph and component configurations.

stage.description: Current execution state of the flow.

mtime.description: Last modification timestamp of the flow.

thumbnail.description: URL or data URI of the flow thumbnail image.

customFields.description: Custom metadata key-value pairs associated with the flow.
